column1: # SE11 structure definition for ZSQLQ_CHUNK - the RFC-safe flat output row of Z_SQL_QUERY_RO.
# Flat + both-release-safe (no STRING/deep components) so it marshals over classic RFC on
# ECC6 and S/4; the PS caller reassembles CHUNK by (ROWNUM, SEQ) into TSV rows.

column6: Tab-joined column values, split across chunks at 4000 chars
